parameters.jsCode:
// Determine which email sequence to send based on segment const contact = $input.first().json; const subjectLines = { 'Turning 65 Soon': 'Are You Turning 65 Soon? Here\'s What You Need to Know About Medicare', 'Medicare Client Review': 'Review Your Medicare Coverage Before Annual Enrollment Ends' }; const htmlContent = { 'Turning 65 Soon': `

Congratulations on Approaching Medicare Eligibility!

Dear ${contact.firstName || 'Friend'},

As you approach your 65th birthday, you may be eligible for Medicare — the federal health insurance program that could significantly reduce your healthcare costs.

Key Medicare Decisions You\'ll Need to Make:

  • Part A (Hospital Insurance) — Usually premium-free if you or your spouse paid Medicare taxes
  • Part B (Medical Insurance) — Standard premium, covers doctor visits and outpatient care
  • Part D (Prescription Drug Coverage) — Helps cover medication costs
  • Medicare Advantage (Part C) — All-in-one alternative to Original Medicare

Our licensed agents are here to help you navigate these choices — at no cost to you.

📖 Download Our Free Medicare Guide

📅 Schedule a Free Consultation

Warm regards,
The Buckalew Financial Team

Licensed in FL, TX, CA, NC, SC, MI | W248767

`, 'Medicare Client Review': `

Annual Enrollment Period — Review Your Coverage

Dear ${contact.firstName || 'Valued Client'},

The Medicare Annual Enrollment Period runs through December 7th. This is your chance to review your current coverage and make sure you have the best plan for the coming year.

Consider Reviewing:

  • Are your doctors still in-network?
  • Have your prescription needs changed?
  • Is your premium still competitive?
  • Do you have the right level of coverage?

Medicare plans and pricing change annually — what worked last year may not be optimal this year.

🔍 Get Your Free Plan Review

📅 Schedule Your Review Today

Warm regards,
The Buckalew Financial Team

Licensed in FL, TX, CA, NC, SC, MI | W248767

` }; return { segment: contact.segment, subject: subjectLines[contact.segment] || subjectLines['Medicare Client Review'], html: htmlContent[contact.segment] || htmlContent['Medicare Client Review'] };

parameters.name: text
